data.title: APhA is concerned with ACIP Secretariat weakening pharmacist representation, as labels Liaison orgs biased.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Washington, the American Pharmacists Association (APhA) expressed great concern over the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP) Secretariat's labeling of Liaison organizations as "special interest groups," suggesting bias. This move has raised alarms as Liaisons play a crucial role in bridging the gap between healthcare providers and ACIP in recommending vaccines. The decision could impact **important figures** related to vaccine recommendations and public health strategies.

data.title: Stallion Uranium updates technology licensing agreement recently announced.
data.description: In a recent report, it was highlighted that the inflation rate in the country has surged by 8.3% over the last year. This marks a significant increase compared to the previous year's rate of 5.7%. The rise in inflation is primarily attributed to the escalating fuel prices which have shot up by 12.5% recently. Additionally, the cost of essential goods and services has also seen a notable increase, with food prices rising by 9.8% and housing costs by 7.6%. The surge in inflation has inevitably impacted the cost of living for citizens across the nation, with many facing financial strain due to the higher prices. These figures underscore the current economic challenges facing the country and highlight the pressing need for measures to stabilize the economy and ease the burden on the population.

data.title: Japan Ministry of Defense's Air Self-Defense Force uses Box for cloud content mgmt. Close knowledge sharing enabled.
data.description: In Tokyo, Box, Inc. (NYSE: BOX) revealed that the Japan Ministry of Defense’s Air Self-Defense Force (ASDF) has opted for Box as its Intelligent Content Management (ICM) platform. This decision involves deploying Box for secure cloud content management and collaboration within its operations. Through Box, ASDF will facilitate secure information sharing internally and externally with affiliated agencies and partners, fostering enhanced knowledge exchange between units. The ASDF's selection of Box underscores the platform's significance in bolstering operational efficiency and secure information handling.

data.title: Newmont Corporation sold 29,213,186 shares of Orosur Mining Inc. at C$0.19 per share, totalling C$5,550,505.34.
data.description: Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, TSX: NGT, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) has recently sold 29,213,186 common shares of Orosur Mining Inc. at a price of C$0.19 per share. The total gross proceeds from the transaction were C$5,550,505.34. Prior to the sale, Newmont held the same amount of shares.
